items.raw_desc: Láthatósági mellény COMPASS Sárga figyelmeztető mellény XXL EN 20471:2013 + A1:2016:        Seeing and being seen - these are certainly basic prerequisites for security. This reflective vest COMPASS will make you or your child more visible at a distance several times greater than if you were just in clothes. Just a small illumination of the light on the reflective surface is enough to illuminate to a size large enough to be seen and alert drivers, cyclists and others. Statistics clearly show that pedestrians, children and cyclists underestimate visibility in road traffic. This puts them at risk of serious injury or death in the event of an accident. With the COMPASS reflective vest, you can be visible up to a distance of 200 meters, but in white clothing you will be visible for a maximum of 60 meters.             Key features of the reflective vest COMPASS yellow XXLUnisex vest COMPASS increases visibility on the roadEasy zip fasteningCOMPASS offers a yellow design in XXL sizeThe vest allows drivers to recognize a person up to 200 meters
